languages.text: "Люди — не машины. Ты пытался упростить людей до механических составляющих — твоя изначальная гипотеза была ошибочна".
"People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."
languages.original_text: "Люди — не машины. Ты пытался упростить людей до механических составляющих — твоя изначальная гипотеза была ошибочна".

traits.locale_text: "People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."
"People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."
"People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."

languages.text: 「人間は機械ではない。人間を機械の部品に分解しようとした。君の最初の仮説は間違っていた」
languages.original_text: "People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."

traits.locale_text: 「人間は機械ではない。人間を機械の部品に分解しようとした。君の最初の仮説は間違っていた。」

languages.text: “人不是机器。你意图把人拆分为机械零件——你最初的假设就有缺陷。”
languages.original_text: "People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."

traits.locale_text: “人不是机器。你意图把人拆分为机械零件——你最初的假设就有缺陷。”

languages.text: « Les gens ne sont pas des machines. Votre hypothèse de base était erronée, car vous considériez ces sujets comme des ensembles de composants mécaniques qu'il était possible de décomposer. »
languages.original_text: "People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."

traits.locale_text: « Les gens ne sont pas des machines. Votre hypothèse de base était erronée, car vous considériez ces sujets comme des ensembles de composants mécaniques qu'il était possible de décomposer. »

languages.text: «Las personas no son máquinas. Intentó tratar a seres humanos como componentes mecánicos; su hipótesis original era errónea».
languages.original_text: "People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."

traits.locale_text: «Las personas no son máquinas. Intentó tratar a seres humanos como componentes mecánicos; su hipótesis original era errónea».

languages.text: "İnsanlar makine değildir. İnsanları mekanik bileşenlere ayırmaya çalıştın. Başlangıç hipotezin kusurluydu."
languages.original_text: "People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlar makine değildir. İnsanları mekanik bileşenlere ayırmaya çalıştın. Başlangıç hipotezin kusurluydu."

languages.text: "Menschen sind keine Maschinen. Ihr wolltet Menschen zu mechanischen Komponenten reduzieren ... das Problem war Eure Ausgangsthese."
languages.original_text: "People are not machines. You tried to break people down into mechanical components — your original hypothesis was flawed."

traits.locale_text: "Menschen sind keine Maschinen. Ihr wolltet Menschen zu mechanischen Komponenten reduzieren ... das Problem war Eure Ausgangsthese."
